title: Grammitis polyhymnia
taxonomy: Grammitis polyhymnia is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Grammitis polyhymnia is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Grammitis, and species G. polyhymnia. This classification reflects the fern's evolutionary relationships and its position within the fern family. The specific classification of Grammitis polyhymnia provides a framework for understanding the fern's unique characteristics and its place in the plant kingdom.
